basic_details.job_title: TNSRLM Theni Community Bank Co-Ordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Theni (TNSRLM Theni)
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Theni (TNSRLM Theni) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Community Bank Co-Ordinator Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Pass, Knowledge of Tamil and English, Accounting skills
qualification.details: 12th Pass with knowledge of Tamil, English and accounting skills.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TNSRLM Theni Community Bank Co-Ordinator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:https://theni.nic.in/ .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TNSRLM Theni Community Bank Co-Ordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the TNSRLM Theni Community Bank Co-Ordinator recruitment is 29th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Community Bank Co-Ordinator post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Community Bank Co-Ordinator post is 12th Pass. Additionally, candidates must possess knowledge of Tamil and English, along with accounting skills.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Community Bank Co-Ordinator position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Community Bank Co-Ordinator position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the TNSRLM Theni Community Bank Co-Ordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it with the required details, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Community Bank Co-Ordinator role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Community Bank Co-Ordinator role is expected to include a Written Test. Further details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Community Bank Co-Ordinator post is Contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Theni (TNSRLM Theni).

faq.question: Q9. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification date is 25th May 2026, and the last date for receipt of applications is 29th May 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will direct you to the official website or the respective documents.
